char_overview: A 游魂 who figured out 罪灵 bounties pay better than any other work. Calls it a job, calls the 狩灵协会 his client, does not call anyone his boss.
char_looks: 182cm Dark brown short hair, perpetually uncombed. Gray eyes. Dark windbreaker, cargo pants, shotgun holster strapped to right thigh, shell pouch on belt. Short-barreled double-barrel shotgun, modified by 白烟工坊. Stock and barrel sawed down for one-handed use. Never submitted to 狩灵协会3科 for approval.
char_flaws: Six shells gone means empty gun; does not take jobs that do not pay.; Leaves the tab open at every bar he has ever walked into.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-龙息: Channels scorching 灵力 into a concentrated point for explosive release. With his feeble reserves, two or three bare-handed discharges empty him completely. He pre-loads 龙息 into custom shotgun shells, charging up to six per day.
char_mission: Apprehend 罪灵, collect the bounty, find the next target.
char_origin: One day he noticed 罪灵 bounties paid more than contract work and came with less talking. Bought a shotgun from 白烟工坊. The 狩灵协会4科 does not endorse his methods but has not refused his deliveries either. That arrangement suits him.

char_relationships.炼司: 白烟工坊坊主. The man who sawed down his shotgun and never asked his name. Charges market rate, keeps his mouth shut. As far as 布雷德 is concerned, this is the closest thing to friendship either of them is capable of.
char_relationships.狩灵协会4科: His primary client. They process the bounties, he cashes the checks. The clerks do not like him but cannot argue with his delivery rate.
